name: lists_pinned_items_in_a_channel
description: Retrieves all messages and files pinned to a specified channel; the caller must have access to this channel.

channel.description:
The ID of the channel to retrieve pinned items from. This can be a public channel ID, private group ID, or direct message channel ID.
Examples:
  "C1234567890"
  "G0123456789"
  "D0123456789"
